message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor DarkSlateGray
  ActorBorderColor black
  ActorBackgroundColor white
  LifeLineBorderColor gray
  LifeLineBackgroundColor white
}

actor Admin as admin
participant "AddEventPage" as AddEventPage
participant "AddEventFormContainer" as AddEventFormContainer
participant "AddClassPopupContainer" as AddClassPopupContainer
participant "ClassForm" as ClassForm
participant "ClassService (Frontend)" as ClassServiceFE
participant "ShiftService (Frontend)" as ShiftServiceFE
participant "Router" as Router
participant "ClassHTTPTransport" as ClassHTTPTransport
participant "ClassEndpoint" as ClassEndpoint
participant "ClassService" as ClassService
participant "ClassCommand" as ClassCommand
participant "ClassQuery" as ClassQuery
participant "TransactionGRPCTransport" as TransactionGRPCTransport
participant "StorageGRPC Transport" as StorageGRPCTransport
participant "MaterialService" as MaterialService
participant "NatsStreaming" as NatsStreaming

admin -> AddEventPage: Click "Attach New Class" Button
activate AddEventPage
AddEventPage -> AddEventFormContainer: attachClass()
activate AddEventFormContainer
AddEventFormContainer --> AddEventPage: attach
deactivate AddEventFormContainer
AddEventPage --> admin: attach
deactivate AddEventPage

admin -> AddClassPopupContainer: Render "Add Class Popup" Container
activate AddClassPopupContainer
AddClassPopupContainer -> ClassForm: render
activate ClassForm
ClassForm --> AddClassPopupContainer: rendered
deactivate ClassForm
AddClassPopupContainer --> admin: Rendered
deactivate AddClassPopupContainer

admin -> AddClassPopupContainer: choose date
activate AddClassPopupContainer
AddClassPopupContainer -> AddClassPopupContainer: handleDateChange(value)
AddClassPopupContainer -> ClassServiceFE: fetchAvailableShifts(date)
activate ClassServiceFE
ClassServiceFE -> ShiftServiceFE: 
activate ShiftServiceFE
ShiftServiceFE --> ClassServiceFE: shifts
deactivate ShiftServiceFE
ClassServiceFE --> AddClassPopupContainer: form data
deactivate ClassServiceFE
AddClassPopupContainer --> admin: form data
deactivate AddClassPopupContainer

admin -> AddClassPopupContainer: choose shift
activate AddClassPopupContainer
AddClassPopupContainer -> AddClassPopupContainer: handleShiftChange()
AddClassPopupContainer -> ClassServiceFE: fetchAvailableShifts(date, [shift])
activate ClassServiceFE
ClassServiceFE --> AddClassPopupContainer: rooms
deactivate ClassServiceFE
AddClassPopupContainer --> admin: form data
deactivate AddClassPopupContainer

admin -> AddClassPopupContainer: fill Form
activate AddClassPopupContainer
AddClassPopupContainer --> admin: form data
deactivate AddClassPopupContainer

admin -> AddClassPopupContainer: Click "Create Class" Button
activate AddClassPopupContainer
AddClassPopupContainer -> AddClassPopupContainer: handleClassFormSubmitted()
AddClassPopupContainer -> ClassServiceFE: bookingClass(payload)
activate ClassServiceFE
ClassServiceFE -> Router: route("GET", "/v2/booking")
activate Router
Router -> ClassHTTPTransport: BookingClass(ClassService, [[ServerOption]])
activate ClassHTTPTransport
ClassHTTPTransport -> ClassEndpoint: Booking(ClassService, withPagination)
activate ClassEndpoint
ClassEndpoint -> ClassService: Create(context, params)
activate ClassService
ClassService -> ClassService: Validate()
alt "Data Valid"
    ClassService -> TransactionGRPCTransport: IsValidTransaction(ProtoBuffer)
    activate TransactionGRPCTransport
    TransactionGRPCTransport --> ClassService: ProtoResponse
    deactivate TransactionGRPCTransport
    alt "% Valid Transaction"
        ClassService -> ClassService: class := ClassModel()
        ClassService -> ClassCommand: Create(context, class)
        activate ClassCommand
        ClassCommand --> ClassService: uuid
        deactivate ClassCommand
        opt "Has materials"
            ClassService -> StorageGRPCTransport: CommitFile(context, ProtoBuffer)
            activate StorageGRPCTransport
            StorageGRPCTransport --> ClassService: link
            deactivate StorageGRPCTransport
            ClassService -> MaterialService: Create(context, payload)
            activate MaterialService
            MaterialService --> ClassService: isCreated
            deactivate MaterialService
        end
        ClassService -> ClassQuery: Find(context, [[SliceConditions]])
        activate ClassQuery
        ClassQuery --> ClassService: classes
        deactivate ClassQuery
        ClassService -> NatsStreaming: publishClassCreated(context, data)
        activate NatsStreaming
        NatsStreaming --> ClassService: published
        deactivate NatsStreaming
    else
        ClassService --> ClassEndpoint: BadRequest
    end
else
    ClassService --> ClassEndpoint: UnprocessableEntity
end
deactivate ClassService
ClassEndpoint --> ClassHTTPTransport: class
ClassHTTPTransport --> Router: response := Response(class, nil)
deactivate ClassHTTPTransport
Router --> ClassServiceFE: response
deactivate Router
ClassServiceFE --> AddClassPopupContainer: response
deactivate ClassServiceFE
AddClassPopupContainer --> admin: response
deactivate AddClassPopupContainer

note right of ClassService: BadRequest\nUnprocessableEntity
note left of ClassEndpoint: BadRequest\nUnprocessableEntity
note left of ClassHTTPTransport: BadRequest\nUnprocessableEntity
note left of Router: BadRequest\nUnprocessableEntity
note left of ClassServiceFE: BadRequest\nUnprocessableEntity
note left of AddClassPopupContainer: BadRequest\nUnprocessableEntity
note left of admin: BadRequest\nUnprocessableEntity

@enduml
```
